meta.name: Joseph Landry
meta.title: Senior Full-Stack Software Engineer
meta.summary: Accomplished Senior Full-Stack and Backend Software Engineer with 10 years of experience designing, scaling, and migrating high-availability systems. Proven track record of leading engineering initiatives, optimizing API performance, and architecting robust cloud infrastructure across financial services and enterprise entertainment domains. Expert in TypeScript/Node.js backend orchestration layers, AWS cloud migrations, and modern JavaScript frameworks, with a deep foundation in computer science and agile engineering practices.

highlights: Accelerated compliance deployment cycles from weeks to 2 days by architecting core features for a React front-end application controlling a massive national fleet of Bitcoin ATMs.

Successfully dockerized and migrated multiple legacy applications to AWS cloud infrastructure, designing robust GitHub Actions CI/CD pipelines in close collaboration with DevOps teams to ensure seamless Infrastructure as Code (IaC) compliance.
Engineered high-throughput Node.js backend APIs utilizing Express, MongoDB, and Formance Ledger to manage secure financial transaction flows.
Led a cross-functional team of software engineers in developing scalable REST APIs and Node.js backend orchestration layers using TypeScript, JavaScript, Express, and Restify.

Directed legacy web service uplifts to AWS Cloud, establishing rigid enterprise coding standards, code reviews, and debugging workflows to guarantee system consistency and high-availability architecture.
Prioritized critical guest-facing features throughout the software development lifecycle (SDLC), ensuring low-latency responses for millions of park visitors.
Drastically improved guest throughput speeds at the front gates across the Resort by scaling a multi-index ElasticSearch API in JavaScript to deliver prompt, context-relevant guest data access.
Maintained, debugged, and optimized critical backend orchestration layers and Node.js microservices across the resort's digital landscape.
Provided Tier-3 application support, triaging and resolving high-priority runtime incidents affecting guest experience applications.
Developed and optimized Node orchestration layers using TypeScript, JavaScript, and Java backend services backed by comprehensive automated test coverage.
Engineered cross-domain search capabilities by championing performance enhancements to a legacy enterprise ElasticSearch implementation.
Participated heavily in complex enterprise deployment operations and production support infrastructure.

Architected and delivered business-critical applications, including a secure online client payment portal and proprietary internal systems using C#, .NET Core, Angular, SQL Server, and Entity Framework.
Owned architectural systems design and technical decision-making for cloud-based applications deployed directly to Azure environments.
Guaranteed code reliability and production stability by writing extensive unit testing suites.
Maintained and extended core desktop applications using C#, .NET Framework, SQL Server, and Entity Framework.
Executed hotfixes and technical feature updates for the public-facing ASP.NET company website.
Optimized data integrity by improving the reliability and processing speed of a Windows Service handling critical database conversions.
Built a custom C# WinForms utility to generate and print data bit streams, resolving legacy data synchronization errors.

Cloud & DevOps: AWS (Lambda, ECS, CloudWatch, Kinesis, S3, CloudFront)
